titleStmt.title: SII 15.724: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 724. (B.K. No. 72 of 1928-29.) BĪḶGI, BIḶGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone built into a wall of the well called Ārettina-bhāvi.
This is dated Śaka 1630, Sarvadhāri, Mārggaśira śu. 10, Thursday, Uttarābhādrapadā, corresponding to 1708 A.D., November 11, Thursday, f.d.n. °43.
It states that Visāji Mahādēva Paṇḍita of Gārgya-gōtra had a well constructed in the northern region of Biḷgi. The record is in Marāṭhi language and Nāgarī characters.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī lakṣmīṁnṛsiṁhāya namaḥ . svasti śrī nṛpa śālivāhana śāke
1630 sarvadhārī nāma saṁvatsara mārgaśorṣa śutdha daśamī ḍuruvā
ra Uttarābhādrapadā nakṣatra śrī lakṣmīṁnṛsiṁhamuddiśyakṛta ṭhārgma
gonotnanna rṛkvedī visājīmahādevapaṁḍita pātālaśayī mahā
rāṣṭra svakaṣda rjiṁta vitteṁ viligīsa Uttarabhagī vihiśdīrghiṁkā
vāṁdhi vilī yā kāmāsa Adhyakṣa Apalā pinṛvya pauna kṛṣṇājī
raghunāyeṁ Āraṁbhāpāsūna yākt pūrṇahoya tāvat parāmarśa ke
lā Apaṇā savaṁśa paraṁparā rājagṛhā pāsūna bhūmi pākśera sa
rvasveṁ dilhī Aseṁ yā madhyeṁ vāpī malā kelā Ahe yā bhūmisa Apu
lyā vaṁśajā vinā Anayajo dravya dhānya phalecaathavā Āropita
phalita puṣpita vṛkṣa dhedakarīla to nārakī hoyīla . ḥ svadattā dvigu
ṇaṁ puṣyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpahrāreṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavet .
Digital edition of SII 15.724 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
